title: Course: COSC 358 - Network Security Fundamentals
description: Introduces security awareness and implementation skills for networks. Covers protocols, security measures in router-based networks across platforms, attack techniques, and defensive responses.
prerequisites_text: COSC 349 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 358 - Network Security Fundamentals
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 349 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: As needed

Description: Introduces security awareness and implementation skills for networks. Covers protocols, security measures in router-based networks across platforms, attack techniques, and defensive responses.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Cloud Computing: Group B
